EPA WARM food-waste landfill case without landfill-gas recovery. Retained as a higher-emission comparison case.

Selected as the default California Paper 1 baseline proxy. This is an inference from EPA WARM Exhibit 1-49 rather than a California facility-specific statewide average. It represents a controlled landfill pathway with landfill-gas recovery and electricity generation.

EPA WARM food-waste anaerobic digestion net-emissions summary value. Used when a California facility inventory can identify digestion share but not wet-vs-dry digestion subtype.
